title: O Vs. T: Tennis Round one
description:
The student and the master face off each other.
rules: Each pair of rounds will consist of music videos from a selected artist/ group. and as all tennis goes the next round will contain bits from the last round.
round one and two: Radiohead
round three and four: The Avalanches
round five and six: Autechre
round seven and eight: WILD CARD!
